title: Scientific Advisory Committee on Medical Devices used in Cardiovascular Systems Agenda June 15, 2018 - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Committee on Medical Devices used in Cardiovascular Systems - Agenda - June 15, 2018
Location: 1600 Scott Street, Holland Cross, Tower B, Room 2048 Date & time: June 15, 2018, 7:30 to 4:00 Participants: SAC-MDUCS members, Guest Speakers, Health Canada employees
7:30-8:00 Refreshments
8:00-8:10 Opening Remarks and Review of the Agenda, Declaration of Affiliations and Interests
8:10-8:20 Summary of how information from previous meeting is being used Kevin Day (Medical Devices Bureau, Therapeutic Products Directorate)
8:20-9:20 Question 1: Patent foramen ovale (PFO) Closure Devices Presenter: Dr. Ashish Shah
9:20-10:15 Question 2: Large bore femoral artery closure devices Presenter : Dr. Marino Labinaz
10:30-12:00 Question 3: Evolving clinical use of transcatheter aortic valve replacement (TAVR) and increasing clinical data stratification Presenter: Dr. Anita Asgar
1:00-2:00 Question 4: Interatrial Shunting for Pulmonary Arterial Hypertension (PAH) Presenter: Dr. John Granton
2:00-3:00 Question 5: Antiplatelet regimen for Drug Eluting Stents Presenter: Dr. Kevin R. Bainey
3:00-4:00 Question 6: Treatment of Unprotected Left Main Coronary Artery Disease Presenter: Dr. Eric Cohen
4:00-4:05 Next Steps, Closing Remarks and Adjournment of Meeting Committee Chair : Dr. John Ducas
